_comment: Permissive config that accepts existing doc style after the 2026-04-29 auto-fix sweep. Disabled rules represent stylistic decisions we accept (line length, inline HTML, table pipe spacing, etc) plus a few auto-fix-but-not-fully-clean ones. Tightening of accessibility rules (MD045 alt-text, MD059 descriptive-links) and link-validity rules (MD051, MD052, MD053) happens incrementally per CLAUDE.md rule 49 self-heal-as-you-go.
